subject: [PATCH 1/4] arm64: request contpte-sized folios for exec memory

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch is a good optimization, but the author should consider adding more comments to explain the changes and their impact on iTLB entries and TLB coalescing.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: The patch modifies the exec_folio_order() function to request contpte-sized folios for executable memory on arm64 architecture, optimizing iTLB entries and TLB coalescing.
